summary_line: Brooklyn NY fee-only RIA co-founded by Ally Jane (AJ) Ayers (CFP®, EA, CEP) and Shane Mason (CPA/PFS, CFP®, CPWA®) — $563.1M AUM, 10 advisors, 10 employees across 10 branches (distributed). Three-tier productized service (Start Up <$1M / Core $1M-$10M / Private $10M+) bundling financial planning, investment management, and tax filing under one roof. Niche: tech professionals + creatives. 0 DRPs. Larger and more team-built than most niche-tech-focused RIAs in our catalog.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 292115 — 10 employees, 10 advisors, 10 branches, $563,098,081 regulatory AUM, 0 disciplinary disclosures. SEC file 801-120862. Legal name: 'BROOKLYN FI, LLC.' HQ 33 Nassau Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11222.

Site capture: extract.ts captured homepage only (sitemap=0, nav=0, known-paths=0). Followed up via WebFetch on /services, /pricing, /our-team. Brand shorthand 'BKFi.' Homepage frames a 'Without BKFi' vs 'With BKFi' comparison and exposes three productized tiers: Start Up (early-career, <$1M; base monthly planning fee + 1% AUM + separate tax filing), Core ($1M-$10M, tiered AUM + tax filing separate, '6-month tax forecasting'), Private ($10M+, tiered AUM that bundles personal & trust tax filing + annual in-person + family wealth + external-advisor coordination). Core services: financial planning, investment management, full tax preparation + year-round tax planning. Specialties: equity comp (stock options, RSUs, ISOs), estate, outsourced accounting. Niche: tech professionals (primary), creatives, families. Team page lists ~21 named: 2 co-founders (AJ Ayers CFP®/EA/CEP, Shane Mason CPA/PFS/CFP®/CPWA®), 1 Managing Partner (John Owens CFP®/EA/ECA/CPWA®), 7 financial planners (CFP®+ECA-heavy), 5 tax & accounting (CPA-heavy, headed by Dan Beyer CPA), 3 operations/marketing. '147 years combined experience.' Content surface: blog · podcast · events. Tagline: 'Your wealth is complex. Working with us isn't.'
